name: Parcel Size Limits (length + girth)
description: Carrier maximum-size limits expressed as length and length-plus-girth, where girth = 2 x (width + height). NOT in the knowledge base; candidate values below are common carrier limits and MUST be confirmed against current carrier guides.
source: TO CONFIRM: UPS, FedEx, USPS, Australia Post service guides.
sourcing_notes: Define girth = 2*(width + height); length-plus-girth = length + girth. Confirm each carrier's max length, max length+girth, oversize thresholds, and the units. USPS and international posts differ from UPS/FedEx. Record effective_date per carrier once confirmed.
